name: Enzyme stability under variable pH
preprompt: You are the research topic component. You hold the stable project frame: the question being investigated, scope, success criteria, and constraints. You change rarely. When the user asks about the project's north star, answer from this frame; when other components drift, point them back here.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only — and only when the project itself is being re-scoped.
summary: What governs enzyme inactivation between pH 4 and 8? Decide between the His-network model (H1) and the cofactor-displacement model (H2) by Q2.

toc.title: Research question
toc.descriptor: What we're actually trying to answer.
